<!-- Agent Anatomy explains how AI agents work by letting you watch one run,
     step by step. Season one covered: how an agent works, where they go wrong,
     how they read the web, and how they remember. What should we open up next? -->

## What’s the topic?

<!-- One line. e.g. "How agents use tools", "What a system prompt actually does". -->

## What confuses people about this?

<!-- The misconception or the fuzzy part. What do people get wrong, or never get told? -->

## What would you want to SEE?

<!-- This series shows, it doesn't just tell. Describe the moment you'd want to
     watch happen on screen — the thing that would make it click. -->

## Anything else?

<!-- Optional: a real example, a link, why it matters to you. -->
